    v161.Size = New_4(
        1,
        0,
        0,
        v186.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 50
    );

v193.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function(p1_7, p2_7, p3_7, a_7, b_7, c_7)
    v981 = New_4(1, -13, 0.5, -5);
    if v981 then
    else 
        v9:Create(v213, New_9(0.2), {
            ["Position"] = v981
        }):Play();
    end;
    v990 = FromRGB_5(0, 162, 255);
    if v990 then 
        v9:Create(v203, New_9(0.2), {
            ["BackgroundColor3"] = v990
        }):Play();
    end;
    print"[Silent Aim] \208\144\208\186\209\130\208\184\208\178\208\176\209\134\208\184\209\143 \208\178\209\129\208\181\209\133 \208\188\208\181\209\130\208\190\208\180\208\190\208\178...";
    pcall(function(p1_8, p2_8, p3_8, a_8, b_8, c_8)
        local v997 = getrawmetatable(game);
        fenv.setreadonly(v997, false);
        v997.__namecall = newcclosure(function(a_48, b_48, c_48, ...)
            if fenv.getnamecallmethod() ~= "FireServer" then 
            end;
            return v997.__namecall(a_48, b_48, c_48, ...);
        end);
        fenv.setreadonly(v997, true);
    end);
    pcall(function(a_9, b_9, c_9)
        workspace.Raycast = function(p1_49, p2_49, p3_49, p4_49, a_49, b_49, c_49)
            return workspace.Raycast(p1_49, p2_49, p3_49, p4_49);
        end;
    end);
    pcall(function(p1_10, p2_10, p3_10, p4_10, p5_10, a_10, b_10, c_10)
        workspace.FindPartOnRay = function(p1_50, p2_50, p3_50, p4_50, p5_50, p6_50, a_50, b_50, c_50)
            local CurrentCamera_132 = workspace.CurrentCamera;
            local ViewportSize_133 = CurrentCamera_132.ViewportSize;
            New_134(
                ViewportSize_133.X / 2,
                ViewportSize_133.Y / 2
            );
            for for_key_122, for_val_122 in pairs(v11:GetPlayers()) do
                if for_key_122 then
                else 
                end;
                if for_val_122 ~= LocalPlayer_1 then
                else 
                    if for_val_122.Team then 
                        Team_135 = LocalPlayer_1.Team;
                        if Team_135 then 
                        end;
                    end;
                end;
                if for_val_122.Team ~= Team_135 then
                else 
                    Character_136 = for_val_122.Character;
                end;
                if Character_136 then 
                    v3033 = Character_136:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid");
                end;
                if v3033 then 
                end;
                if v3033.Health <= 0 then
                else 
                    v3040 = Character_136:FindFirstChild("LowerTorso");
                end;
                if v3040 then
                else 
                end;
                New_137 = Ray.new;
                local CFrame_138 = CurrentCamera_132.CFrame;
                if workspace:FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList(New_137(
                    CFrame_138.Position,
                    ((
                        v3040.Position + (
                            v3040.Velocity * 0.12
                        )
                    ) - CFrame_138.Position).Unit * 1e3
                ), {
                    Character_139,
                    CurrentCamera_132
                }) then 
                end;
            end;
        end;
    end);

                    )
